zh.Woolverstone, Suffolk, England, United K: 英國英格蘭素福爾可武爾福斯東

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Edith Latymer of Duntish於1437年出生在英國米德萊可可拉肯維爾時，她的父親Sir William Perot Latimer29歲，母親Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge22歲。她至少有1個兒子。她去世於1504年9月1日在英國享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾圖維。

zh-hans.Clerkenwell, Middlesex, England: 英国米德萊可可拉肯維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Edith Latymer of Duntish于1437年出生在英国米德萊可可拉肯維爾时，她的父亲Sir William Perot Latimer29岁，母亲Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge22岁。她至少有1个儿子。她去世于1504年9月1日在英国享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾圖維。

nameMeanings.name: Latymer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a Latinist, a clerk who wrote documents in Latin, from Anglo-Norman French latinier, latim(m)ier. Latin was more or less the universal language of official documents in the Middle Ages, displaced only gradually by the vernacular – in England, by Anglo-Norman French at first, and eventually by English.

variants.name: Latner
meanings: English: occupational name for a worker in or maker of latten or brass, from Middle English latoun ‘brass’ (Old French laton). This name may sometimes have been confused with Latimer .
Altered form of German   Lattner   or   Lettner  .

variants.name: Lattner
meanings: German: occupational name for a carpenter who prepared or used laths or slats, from Middle High German latte ‘slat, lath’ + -n (plural suffix) + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Edith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

variants.name: Edythe
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Edith Latymer of Duntish was born in 1437, in Clerkenwell, Middlesex, England, her father, Sir William Perot Latimer, was 29 and her mother, Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge, was 22. She had at least 1 son. She died on 1 September 1504, in England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Turvey, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Edith Latymer of Duntish est née en 1437, à Clerkenwell, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Perot Latimer, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 1 septembre 1504, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Turvey, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Edith Latymer of Duntish 1437 in Clerkenwell, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Perot Latimer 29 und ihre Mutter Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge 22. Sie hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 1. September 1504 im Alter von 67 Jahren in England und wurde in Turvey, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Edith Latymer of Duntish è nata il nel 1437 nel Clerkenwell, Middlesex, England, sua padre, Sir William Perot Latimer, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 1 settembre 1504, nel England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Turvey, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Edith Latymer of Duntishが1437年にイギリスミッドレセックスクラーケンウエルで生まれた時，父Sir William Perot Latimerは29歳，母Lady Anne Huffer Bokingeは22歳であった。彼女は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1504年9月1日にイギリスで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアトゥルビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Edith Latymer of Duntish(이)가 1437년 영국 미들레세스 클레르켄웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Perot Latimer(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1504년 9월 1일 영국에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 터르비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Edith Latymer of Duntish nasceu em 1437, em Clerkenwell, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Perot Latimer, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1504, em Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Turvey, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Edith Latymer of Duntish родилась в 1437 г. в местности клиркенвелл, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Perot Latimer было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge, 22. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 1 сентября 1504 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности турви, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Edith Latymer of Duntish nació en 1437, en Clerkenwell, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Perot Latimer, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1504, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Turvey, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
